ctc_strategy.narrative: Given the significant savings under the New Regime, it is advisable to leverage the restructuring potential of Rs 32,722.56 by optimizing contributions towards tax-saving schemes such as Section 80C and Section 80CCD(2). Additionally, considering the applicability of Section 115BAC for eligible individuals could further reduce taxable income, thereby enhancing overall savings to Rs 167,232.00.
